title: PVC Plasticizer Migration into Contact Adhesive
rate_factors: Migration rate increases with temperature, pressure, and direct contact area. Phthalate-based plasticizers (DOP, DINP) migrate faster than polymeric plasticizers. Rate doubles approximately every 10 degrees C above ambient.

climate_context.typical_environment: rooftop PVC membrane in direct sun contact with adhesive-bonded flashing

notes: PVC plasticizers migrate into contact adhesives and certain sealants, causing softening and bond degradation. Use only PVC-compatible adhesives approved by the membrane manufacturer. Avoid bitumen-based products in contact with PVC.
